title: String.to_atom on external competition input
evidence: query_engine.ex filter_by_competition/2 calls String.to_atom(comp) on the user-supplied competition string; get_standings also calls String.to_atom(competition)
suggestion: Use String.to_existing_atom/1 or map known competitions explicitly to avoid unbounded atom creation from untrusted input

title: Data directory resolved relative to current working directory
evidence: data_loader.ex:8 @data_dir = Path.join([File.cwd!(), "..", "data", "kaggle"]) — load works only when launched from the brazilian_soccer_mcp dir
suggestion: Resolve the data path via Application.app_dir/priv or an env var so the server runs from any cwd

title: Team stats include home/away split beyond spec
evidence: query_engine.ex calculate_team_stats accumulates home_wins/away_wins etc.; format_team_stats reports the breakdown (R6 only required W/L/D + goals)

title: token_efficiency scored 0.0
evidence: scores.json token_efficiency=0.0 (normalized cross-run metric, not a code defect)
suggestion: Informational only; mechanical scores otherwise strong (code_quality=1.0, test_coverage=1.0, idiomatic=0.83)
